blended.narrative: Big Sky is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,298 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 56".
